questionHtml:
How are villi, alveoli and nephrons similar?

A.  They are internal organs.

B.  They provide large surface areas for molecular exchange.

C.  They secrete hormones.

D.  They have a role in excretion.

meta.title: How are villi, alveoli and nephrons similar? A. They are internal organs. B. They provide large surface areas for molecular exchange. C. They secrete hormones. D. They have a role
